The Product

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

01
Workout Tracking

Log every set, rep, and weight in real-time. Auto-progression reminders based on your last session. No guessing — just data.

02
Smart Templates

Build custom workout templates or choose from 500+ preloaded exercises. Share with friends. Clone and modify. Train faster.

03
Muscle Heatmaps

Visual weekly muscle volume breakdown. See what you're overtrained, undertrained, or perfectly balanced. Fix your programming.

04
Streaks & Progress

Consecutive training days, volume PRs, bodyweight trends. Progress that you can see, not just feel. Numbers don't lie.

The OS layer
Roadmap

Four phases.
One vision.

PHASE — 01
Distribution
  • Partner with local gyms
  • Users download Urbeh at the gym
  • 500 preloaded exercises
  • 30-day free trial
  • ₹25/month subscription
  • Gym acts as distribution
Active Now
PHASE — 02
Network
  • Access partner gyms anywhere
  • Pay per session / day / week
  • Urbeh = fitness passport
  • Cross-city gym network
  • Verified gym directory
  • Seamless check-in via app
Coming Next
PHASE — 03
Platform
  • Gym owner dashboards
  • Trainer tools + client tracking
  • Analytics & retention insights
  • Community layer
  • Group challenges
  • B2B SaaS revenue
After Traction
PHASE — 04
Expansion
  • E-commerce (supplements, gear)
  • Physical Urbeh products
  • Owned infrastructure
  • Turfs, pools, spaces
  • Global expansion
  • Full fitness ecosystem
Long-term Vision
08 — In-Gym Marketing
Collateral — Poster System

Every gym partner receives Urbeh-branded collateral. The poster system is unified — black, neon, bold. No gym logo, no co-branding. Urbeh owns the wall.

A3 / A2 poster — gym entrance placement
Digital screens — locker rooms & reception
QR code links directly to app download
Always Urbeh brand — never white-labelled
Competitive Moat

Why Urbeh
wins long-term.

🔒
Data Lock-in

Every workout logged, every PR hit, every streak built — it's all in Urbeh. Users don't leave. Their history is their identity.

🌐
Network Effects

More users → more gyms want to partner. More gyms → more users come. Each new node makes the whole network more valuable.

💳
Fitness Passport

Once users travel and use partner gyms on Urbeh, no competitor can replicate that cross-gym access layer without starting over.

🏷️
Price Defensibility

₹25/month is nearly impossible to compete with at scale. It's entry-level pricing with premium-level stickiness. Volume wins.

🎯
Brand Ownership

No white-labeling. Every gym using Urbeh builds the Urbeh brand, not their own. We own the relationship with the user. Always.

📊
Behavioural Data

Aggregate workout data across thousands of users creates proprietary insights no competitor has — powering smarter recommendations over time.

Brand Guidelines

The Urbeh
Identity System.

01 — Philosophy
What We Stand For
1% Better Everyday
Track. Train. Transform.
No Fluff. Just Reps.

Urbeh doesn't inspire. It delivers. We are not a motivational poster. We are a precision tool. Every design decision, every word choice, every interaction must feel like it was engineered — not decorated.

02 — Tone of Voice
How We Sound
Do Say
Track your sets. Own your progress.
500 exercises. Zero excuses.
₹25. No contracts.
Your data. Your history.
Never Say
Unlock your potential ✗
Join the fitness family ✗
Transform your life today ✗
We believe in you ✗

04 — Typography
Type Scale

Display / Hero
Section Title Barlow Condensed 800
H2 / Section
Card Heading Barlow 600
H3 / Card
Body copy — clean, readable, uncluttered. Barlow 300
Body
DATA / LABELS / UI IBM Plex Mono
Labels / Data
05 — UI Principles
Design Rules
▣
Dashboard-first thinking
Every screen should feel like a data cockpit. Information architecture over decoration.
◎
Neon sparingly
Accent green is used for data, actions, and status — never for decoration.
⬡
Subtle glow, never bloom
box-shadow with low opacity. Never full glow rings or neon borders on everything.
◻
White space is not empty
Generous spacing signals confidence. Clutter signals insecurity.
06 — Logo Usage
Logo Placements (Upload your logo file to replace placeholders)
URBEH
On Dark — Primary
URBEH
On Light
URBEH
On Neon
Logo Rules ✓ Always use on black, charcoal, or neon backgrounds
✓ Minimum clear space: 1× logo height on all sides
✓ Wordmark always uppercase
✗ No stretched, rotated, or recoloured logos
✗ No drop shadows on the logo
✗ Never use on complex photography without overlay
07 — Photography Style
Visual Direction
📸
Real Gym. Real People.

Actual gyms with actual equipment. No pristine studio setups. Chalk, sweat, iron — the real environment.

🎞️
Slight Film Grain

Apply a subtle grain texture (10–20% opacity). Not a filter. A texture. It should feel shot, not generated.

🌑
Dark, Moody Tones

Deep shadows. Directional light. No flat, even lighting. Contrast is the mood. Never bright and airy.
